---
title: "Meeting Notes"
subtitle: "CHW Maternal Mental Health Review — Kickoff Meeting"
date: "2026-03-01"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
  docx:
    toc: false
---

# Meeting Details

- **Date:** 2026-03-01
- **Time:** 10:00 – 10:30 AM EST
- **Location:** Virtual (Teams)
- **Note taker:** Demo Researcher

## Attendees

- [x] Demo Researcher (Lead)
- [x] Dr. Smith (Supervisor)
- [x] J. Doe (Research Assistant)

## Agenda

1. Review systematic review topic and scope
2. Discuss PICO framework and search strategy approach
3. Agree on timeline and milestones
4. Assign roles and responsibilities

# Discussion Notes

## Topic and Scope

The team agreed to proceed with a systematic review on the effectiveness of
community health worker (CHW) interventions for maternal mental health in
low- and middle-income countries. The review will focus on depression as the
primary outcome, with anxiety as a secondary outcome.

Dr. Smith recommended including both individual and cluster-RCTs, and
suggested considering quasi-experimental designs on a case-by-case basis.

## PICO Framework

The team defined the PICO elements:

- **Population:** Pregnant and postpartum women (up to 12 months) in LMICs
- **Intervention:** CHW-delivered mental health interventions
- **Comparator:** Standard care or no intervention
- **Outcome:** Depression/anxiety measured by validated instruments

J. Doe flagged that some studies use "lay health worker" or "peer supporter"
rather than "community health worker" — the search strategy must capture all
equivalent terms including "task-shifting" and "task-sharing."

## Timeline

Target completion: September 2026 for journal submission. Monthly check-in
meetings scheduled for the first Friday of each month.

## Roles

- Demo Researcher: Primary reviewer, all phases
- J. Doe: Second reviewer for 20% of screening and all full-text review
- Dr. Smith: Oversight, GRADE assessment, manuscript review

# Decisions Made

| Decision | Rationale | Made by |
|----------|-----------|---------|
| Use PRISMA 2020 reporting standard | Systematic review with meta-analysis | Team consensus |
| Target September 2026 submission | Allows 6 months from protocol to submission | Team consensus |
| Use RWA for workflow support | Streamlines search, tracking, and documentation | Team consensus |

# Action Items

| # | Action | Assignee | Due Date | Status |
|---|--------|----------|----------|--------|
| 1 | Draft PICO and register PROSPERO protocol | Demo Researcher | March 5 | Complete |
| 2 | Develop and execute search strategy | Demo Researcher | March 10 | Complete |
| 3 | Set up Zotero collection for references | J. Doe | March 5 | Complete |
| 4 | Review search strategy before execution | Dr. Smith | March 8 | Complete |

# Next Meeting

- **Date:** 2026-04-04 (First Friday of April)
- **Agenda items to carry forward:**
  - Review screening results
  - Discuss data extraction form
  - Review preliminary risk of bias assessments

---

*Meeting notes recorded with AI assistance (`@project-manager` agent). Content verified by attendees.*
